title: NASA Solar System Exploration
description: A NASA source card for planets, moons, asteroids, comets, and exploration missions.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Solar System Exploration organizes information about planets, dwarf planets, moons, asteroids, comets, missions, discoveries, and comparative planetary science.
Use this source for research projects where students compare objects by size, orbit, composition, atmosphere, temperature, and mission evidence.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
